title: US Forms 15-Point Plan to End Iran War as Trump Pushes Talks
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The US has drafted a 15-point plan intended to help bring the war with Iran to a close, according to people familiar with the matter, highlighting the intensifying urgency within the Trump administration to resolve the conflict as the economic toll mounts.President Donald Trump has been pushing talks with Iran in a bid to halt the fighting. title: Delaware Moves to Establish State Framework for Stablecoin Issuers
summary: The proposal would create a state licensing regime for stablecoin issuers while bolstering Delaware’s position to attract digital asset firms.

title: The WSJ Dollar Index Falls 0.20% to 96.12
summary: “The dollar stabilized to a certain extent today after retreating in the prior session, but could remain relatively volatile as markets react to geopolitical developments in the Middle East,” The Revacy Fund’s Zaheer Anwari says in a note.  The DXY dollar index is flat at 99.77.  0858 GMT – The euro is at risk of falling unless there are positive developments in the Middle East, ING’s  Francesco Pesole  says in a note.
